headline: Why WeightWatchers (WW) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of personal wellness company WeightWatchers (NASDAQ:WW) jumped 6.3% in the afternoon session after the company announced its Weight Watchers Med+ program is now accessible through Eli Lilly's digital healthcare platform, LillyDirect.

content.title: Why WeightWatchers (WW) Stock Is Trading Up Today
content.summary: Shares of personal wellness company WeightWatchers (NASDAQ:WW) jumped 6.3% in the afternoon session after the company announced its Weight Watchers Med+ program is now accessible through Eli Lilly's digital healthcare platform, LillyDirect.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Techs Fall After Dow Hits High, AI Shrugs Off Broadcom, Ciena; Jobs Report Looms
summary: Dow Jones futures edged lower overnight, while S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures fell modestly. The May jobs report is on tap before Friday's open. S&P Dow Jones Indices announced late Thursday that it won't fast track SpaceX and other upcoming megacap IPOs such as Anthropic and OpenAI into the benchmark index.

headline: Eli Lilly Pressure And RNA Expansion Reframe CRISPR Therapeutics Outlook
summary: Eli Lilly reported positive Phase 1b data for VERVE-102, a gene-editing cardiovascular therapy, raising fresh competitive pressure on CRISPR Therapeutics' CTX310 program. CRISPR Therapeutics (NasdaqGM:CRSP) is broadening beyond gene editing with the acquisition of CTX611, a phase 2 siRNA therapy targeting blood clotting. These developments arrive as large pharma and specialist biotech companies increase focus on genetic and RNA-based approaches to cardiovascular disease. For you as an...

headline: Gilead, Merck, Eli Lilly Lead $106B Biopharma Takeover Wave In 2026
summary: Biopharma M&A has surged to $106 billion across 201 deals through early June 2026, putting the sector on track for its strongest full-year total since the 2019 pre-pandemic peak, CNBC reported.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Eli Lilly (LLY) Expanded GLP-1 Access And Digital Obesity Ecosystem
summary: In late May and early June 2026, Eli Lilly reported strong Phase 3 results for obesity, diabetes and oncology drugs, broadened coverage of its full obesity portfolio by all three major U.S. pharmacy benefit managers, and added Sesame and WW International’s Weight Watchers Med+ programs to its LillyDirect digital platform to improve access and support for patients. Together, these developments deepen Lilly’s presence across the entire cardiometabolic care journey, from gene-editing and...

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Techs Fall As AI Trade Cools; Jobs Report Looms
summary: Dow Jones futures rose slightly early Friday, while S&P 500 futures and especially Nasdaq futures fell. The May jobs report is on tap before the open. S&P Dow Jones Indices announced late Thursday that it won't fast track SpaceX and other upcoming megacap IPOs such as Anthropic and OpenAI into the benchmark index.
